subcodes.first_line: O thou servant! Hearken unto the Call of God, then act in accordance with that which hath been ordained for thee by thy Lord, and be not of them that waver in their faith [3.5s]... ...By God, the True One! Were We, for a single instant, to withhold from him the outpourings of Our Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها العبد اسمع ندآء الله ثم اعمل بما تومر من لدن ربک و لاتکن فی دین
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @contention and conflict, @suffering and imprisonment, @humility; meekness; lowliness
